巴塞新帥就艾斯派古達接觸車仔

Bein Sport、Goal和《世界體育報》等多家媒體報道，巴塞隆拿新帥華維迪以車路士後衛艾斯派古達為簽約目標。

巴塞自丹尼爾艾維斯離隊後，右閘位置出現缺口，欠缺一名世界級人選，阿歷斯維度和沙治奧羅拔圖的表現都未能予人十足信心。

隨著魯迪加正式加盟車路士，艾斯派古達離隊的機會進一步增加。雖然此前一直盛傳，巴塞在右後衛位置上的首選是阿仙奴的比拿連，但自新帥華維迪上任後，他更喜歡屬於另一倫敦球會的艾斯派古達。

事實上，巴塞也留意了艾斯派古達很長時間。他過去曾在奧沙辛拿效力過三個球季，有近一百場西甲上陣紀錄，而且是西班牙國家隊成員，與碧基、佐迪艾巴等有不少合作經驗。

Bein Sport評論員彭美尼 (Tancredi Palmeri) 引述西班牙電台消息，指巴塞已就艾斯派古達的轉會與車路士展開接觸。Goal報道，華維迪已向巴塞高層要求提供財政資源，向艾斯派古達展開收購行動。

艾斯派古達曾經公開表示：「能與巴塞隆拿聯繫在一起是一個榮譽，這顯示我表現得不錯。」

《世界體育報》作出了民意調查，問讀者誰是巴塞最應該簽入的右後衛，艾斯派古達得到過半票數，大幅領先於比拿連。

Tottenham eyeing AS Monaco defender Kamil Glik

Tottenham are eyeing AS Monaco defender Kamil Glik.

Spurs boss Mauricio Pochettino is in the market for a new centre-half signing and Glik is under consideration.

L'Equipe says Spurs have already registered their interest with ASM for the Switzerland international.

However, ASM are confident they won't lose the 29 year-old, who's contract runs to 2020.

Former Torino captain Glik only signed for Monaco a year ago.

LAFC CLOSE TO SNEIJDER DEAL

Los Angeles FC is close to agreeing to a two-year deal with Galatasaray playmaker Wesley Sneijder, ESPNFC reports.

The 33-year-old would become the first designated player signing for the MLS expansion franchise, which will debut in the 2018 season.

Sneijder, who has 12 months remaining on his current contract, would remain with Galatasaray until reporting for MLS preseason in January.

Gianluigi Donnarumma has officially signed a four-year contract renewal with Milan, including the arrival of his brother.

It runs to June 2021 and is reported to be worth €6m per year net.

The 18-year-old goalkeeper had originally turned down a new deal, which would’ve made him a free agent in June 2018.

When the club resumed negotiations after the European Under-21 Championship, they found a breakthrough and worked out a new deal.

It’s believed this includes release clauses, one of around €70-100m and another of circa €50m if they fail to qualify for the Champions League.

As part of the deal, Milan signed Antonio Donnarumma, also a goalkeeper and his older brother, who underwent a medical today.

It’s a return for 27-year-old Antonio Donnarumma, who was already in the Rossoneri youth academy and is the reason Gigio supports the San Siro side.

Antonio never played for the senior Milan squad, going out on loan to Piacenza and Gubbio before he was sold to Genoa in 2012.

He has also played for Bari and last season Asteras Tripoli.

Antonio Donnarumma’s contract is worth €1m per year.

Agent Mino Raiola had been eager to push Donnarumma towards Real Madrid, Manchester United or Paris Saint-Germain.

Manchester United are continuing their push for €55m-rated Inter winger Ivan Perisic and want him in their pre-season tour of China.

The Croatia international is eager to make the move and agreed terms with Jose Mourinho as far back as in March.

Inter made it clear from the start they wanted €55m for the winger and are not going to move from that, as they are under no pressure to sell.

There could be developments over the next few days, as Perisic is starting pre-season training and Coach Luciano Spalletti said he wanted to “hear” what his intentions were.

Meanwhile, the Daily Telegraph and Guardian both report Mourinho wants Perisic in the squad by the time Manchester United fly out for their pre-season tour of China next Tuesday.

Offers worth €30m, €32m and €45m have already been rejected out of hand.

槍手領隊雲加在接受THIS Football報訪問中，炮轟巴巴托斯和山齊斯等人，稱他們就是槍手更衣室的撚屌。 

雲加談到：“如果你作為球隊領隊，你本應該感到高興因為這是一種榮譽，你可以帶領你的球隊不斷前進，你就是球隊領袖，但是我從來沒有享受過這樣的待遇，球隊有太多超級球星他們踢球都是以我為主，更衣室經常發生矛盾，開始我還試著去阻止，後來他們直接叫我閉嘴，我根本感覺不到自己就是隊長。” 

雲加:“在球隊山齊斯拿常常痛罵一些年輕球員，這在正常不過了，不過也有球員被激怒的時候，記得在一場熱身賽中場休息的時候，山齊斯拿上半場踢得很不自在，回到更衣室用水瓶怒砸一位才進球隊的球員，當時很多隊友都已經無法容忍山齊斯的所作所為，在加上那些常被他欺辱的球員無法阻止一幕發生了，至少有10人群毆了山齊斯，你可以想像被10人群毆的滋味，在一旁的奧斯爾更是拍手叫好，不停大喊：“給我打，把他往死裡打，”當時巴巴托斯、基奧特這兩位大佬並沒有參與這次毆鬥，他們也沒有阻止好像一切與他兩無關。” 

保方：“當發生那件事情后，山齊斯的更衣櫃多了一根鐵棍，我想他是用來防身吧，在2017年歐聯山齊斯正是用這根鐵棍報復了基奧特，在最後一場對陣曼狗比賽結束後，全隊回到更衣室，基奧特諷刺性說道：“英超最佳後衛，明天我們就要回家了，”基奧特臉色僵硬但並沒有回應什麼，只是默默的走出更衣室，這不像基奧特的性格，果然在邦路斯再次回到更衣室的時候手裡握著一根木棍，在山齊斯毫無防備的情況一棍打下，山齊斯挨那一下著實不輕，趴在地上痛苦的抬頭才看到是打他那人正是雲加，不等雲加起身，山齊斯又是一頓亂棍爆打，奧斯爾在地上滿地打滾不停求饒，在一旁的山齊斯可不會放過這樣的機會不斷說道：“雲加，打狗，用力打，往死裡給我打，打雲加怎能少了我。 ” 

山齊斯的防身鐵棍終於派上了用場，可惜一棍下去奧斯爾就昏死了過去，打的興起的雲加怒了，朝著山齊斯吼道：“這下還還怎麼打，你該滾一邊去”山齊斯也不甘示弱：“你在說一遍，有種你重複一遍，”基奧特沒有在回應山齊斯什麼，如果山齊斯手上沒有鐵棍那麼他們肯定會打起來。 

當時我身邊的隊醫嘴裡不停的說：“瘋了，瘋了，都已經瘋了。”

Reports in Italy suggest Sampdoria are interested in Arsenal midfielder Jack Wilshere.

The English international spent last year on loan at Bournemouth, and is unlikely to be in Arsene Wenger’s plans for the coming season.

Last summer saw links to Milan and Roma before Wilshere decided to move to the Cherries, and Sky Italia is reporting that he once again has an Italian option.

It’s claimed Sampdoria have enquired about his availability, with the Gunners asking for €10m [£8.8m].

The Blucerchiati could be prepared to pay that, as they look to add international experience to their midfield.

Wilshere, 25, has been capped 34 times by England, scoring two goals.
